Zhuge Zhang ŤęłŤĎõÁíč
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhuge Zhang (ŤęłŤĎõÁíč). Wrote a letter to Zhuge Liang, urging him to submit Shu to Wei. Zhuge Zhang was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
